10_abdull_you_idiot_dont: Abdull, you idiot!  Don't stand there talking to him.  Get him!
1_you_make_bad_mistake: You make bad mistake.  You no belong here.  Now, I get you.  I break you in bits.
2_you_you_have_defeated: You!  You have defeated my brothers.  Now I will destroy you.
3_abdull_what_is_this: Abdull, what is this noise?  You!  Good to see you here.  Now I get you.  I break you in bits.
4_i_am_abduel_you: I am Abduel.  You killed my brother.  Prepare to die.
5_so_you_think_you: So you think you come here to steal.  No, you come here to die.
6_abdull_the_blackbird_is: Abdull, the Blackbird is gone.  Someone has taken the Blackbird!
7_caught_like_a_rat: Caught like a rat in a trap.
8_everythings_all_right_boss: Everything's all right, Boss.  Everything's just great.
9_i_will_make_the: I will make the rat squeek.  I will make the rat go splat.
